# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

Prevent memcached exposed port.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: web-application:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-application-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
          name: memcached
        args:
        - "-m"
        - "512"
        - "-c"
        - "1024"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
    name: memcached
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: background-worker:latest
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        - name: WORKER_THREADS
          value: "4"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - pgrep -f worker
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
